Insidious Decay  

Description

1: Increase Disease Counter by 9
2: Decrease Disease Resist by 10 (L52) to 75 (L130)

Details   Raw Spell Data, Lucy Spell View

Mana: 100 Skill: Conjuration
Casting Time: 1 Recast Time: 5
Fizzle Time: 1.5 Resist: Unresistable
Range: 200 Location: Any
Time of Day: Any Fizzle Adj: 15
Deletable: No Dot Stacking: Yes
Reflectable: Yes Focusable: Yes
Dispellable: No Interruptable: Yes
Short Buff Box: No Target Type: Single
Spell Type: Detrimental Source: Live 12/03

Messages

Cast on you: You feel a fever settle upon you.
Cast on other: Soandso sweats and shivers, looking feverish.
Effect Fades: Your fever has broken.

Game Description

Infects your target with a fever, causing them to become more susceptible to other diseases.

Items with this effect

  • Spell: Insidious Decay

Quick Facts

Scroll:
Spell: Insidious Decay
ClassLevel
SHM52
Expansion:

Duration:
11.4 mins @L52 to 14.0 mins @L65
  • Comments (11)
  • Sold By (1)
  • Quested (2)
  • Crafted (1)
  • Screenshots
  • Spell: Insidious Decay - Research 143

Merchants:


The Plane of Knowledge
  • Mystic Ryrin - 65pp 1gp 9sp 6cp
  • Shaman Spells (Evil)
  • Shaman Spells (Good)
Post Comment
Advanced Search
QuoteReply
# May 21 2007 at 9:52 AM Rating: Decent
nyteshayd
View User Forum
Scholar
530 posts
In the Advanced Search database, this effect shows up on TONS of items, even though the items do not have this effect. This search (Iksar Monk Wrist Armor with AC value of 5, HP value of 1, excluding Legends and Raid) is just one example, showing the following items having the effect:

Hardened Energeiac Leather Wristguard
Vile Wristraps
Tempered Hive Bracelet
Grainy Leather Bracer
Icy Bracer of the Goblin Taskmaster
Chord of Guile
Scaled Alloy Wristguard
Beastly Leather Bracers
Shadowdrake Bracer
Dark Hide Bracer of Rage
Bracer of Undying Memories
Vasha's Bracelet of Mourning
Fungus Tanned Leather Bracer
Leather Freeport Commoner Bracer
Bristlebane's Bewildering Bangle
Leather Bracer of Slaughter
Pristine Bracelet of Destruction
Crystalwing Leather Vambraces
Leather Wristband of the Enforcer
Ichor Cured Leather Bracer
Dusty Ash-Covered Wraps
Wristguard of the Mediator
Fired Bracer of Honor
Lacuna Silk Bracer
Issued Mesh Bracers
Cabilis Hunter Bracer
Protector of Quellious Bracer...

The list is virtually endless.
____________________________
Jiriki Sa`Onserei, 120/67k AA Wood Elf Ranger
Anadriel Starfire, 120/46k AA High Elf Mage
▲ Page top
Advanced Search
QuoteReply
# May 22 2007 at 3:06 AM Rating: Decent
nyteshayd
View User Forum
Scholar
530 posts
No, not at all.

What I am pointing out is that, despite the fact that none of the aforementioned items have Insidious Decay (which is not a problem, cool as it would be to have that as a clicky), that search and many others show an effect of Insidious Decay on many items. Click the link and look at the "effect" column.

There is only one item that has Insidious Decay as an effect when using that as a search-defining term, and that's the spell itself.
____________________________
Jiriki Sa`Onserei, 120/67k AA Wood Elf Ranger
Anadriel Starfire, 120/46k AA High Elf Mage
▲ Page top
Advanced Search
QuoteReply
# May 21 2007 at 10:12 AM Rating: Excellent
Nizdaar
Bad j00 j00
2,159 posts
The list isn't endless. It's just displaying every single piece of armour that an Iksar Monk can wear on their wrist. You didn't select Insidious Decay as a limiter. When you do, nothing comes up at all (which is how it should be).

This is the search you really want?

Ok I figured why. It says on this page
Items with this effect: Null Item

One of the slots on my Ranger has a "Null item" value in it.

Unresistable
QuoteReply
# Aug 17 2003 at 7:10 PM Rating: Default
__DEL__1591793312141
5 posts
Very good spell, Its has a quick cast time, is Unresistable, and stacks with malo type spells makes this one a must have for slowing, Casting It and Malosi on a Mob means odds of the mob resisting slow are very low (Shaman's slow being a disease)
▲ Page top
RE: Unresistable
QuoteReply
# Dec 13 2003 at 2:52 PM Rating: Decent
__DEL__1593362579053
11 posts
there is one slow that is based on disease...but the slow that gives the best result (reducing attack speed) is based on magic save..so you wont be using this often..
▲ Page top
RE: Unresistable
QuoteReply
# Apr 23 2004 at 8:34 AM Rating: Default
__DEL__1592758582724
29 posts
well you will use it more often if your a Solo'n shammy who likes to use PoX because it gets resisted quite abit.
▲ Page top
#REDACTED, Posted: Oct 08 2003 at 2:39 AM, Rating: Sub-Default, (Expand Post) Shaman slow are Magic based thats Beastlord who got the disease based Slow spell.
